name: feat-ESE-0021-02
title: DensityGrid and marching squares
description: Implement DensityGrid allocation and the marching squares algorithm for extracting terrain boundaries. The density grid is a Uint8Array where 255=solid, 0=empty. Marching squares produces edge chains (Vec2[][]) for collision and rendering.
acceptanceCriteria:
- allocateDensityGrid creates grid for a chunk with given resolution
- fillDensityGrid sets all values to solid (255)
- marchingSquares extracts edge chains from density grid
- Handles all 16 marching squares cases
- Edge interpolation for smooth contours
- Unit tested with known patterns
demoDeliverable: Terminal output from unit tests showing marching squares edge extraction.
testingScenarios:
- Allocate density grid, verify correct size
- Fill grid solid, verify all 255
- Full solid grid produces no interior edges
- Single empty cell in solid grid produces correct square contour
- Half-empty grid produces straight edge
- L-shaped void produces correct corner contour
stakeholderUnderstanding: The density grid and marching squares algorithm for terrain boundary extraction.
